title: Request a refund for a billing error
body:
# Request a refund for a billing error

If you were charged incorrectly:

1. Go to **Billing > Invoices** and locate the disputed charge.
2. Click **Report an issue** next to the invoice line item.
3. Choose a reason (duplicate charge, wrong amount, unused service, other) and add details.
4. Submit the request — most refund requests are reviewed within 3 business days.

Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method and typically appear within 5-10 business days, depending on your bank.
